narrative:
Green Creek D (precinct in Sandusky County) has 563 registered voters, with 47.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.4 percentage points.
